/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/talk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/talk_to_mcu_interfaces/msg/detail/num__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/sbzrgn/Desktop/My-ROS2_Projects/My-ROS2/TalktoMCU_without_uROS/build/talk_to_mcu_interfaces:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libtalk_to_mcu_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
